stemHtml:
The crew of an aircraft flying at FL 100 in IMC in mountainous terrain wishes to descend to FL70. Given the following information, what is the True Altitude at FL70 that the crew needs to use to confirm terrain clearance before descending to the new level?

OAT at FL100: -20o C
QNH: 975 hPa
QNH report is from a nearby airport close to sea level
Pressure correction 1 hPa = 30 ft
